name: io.github.bodywithoutorganss/film-data-mcp
description: MCP server for film data: TMDB API and Wikidata awards

environmentVariables.description: TMDB API access token (get free at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api)
environmentVariables.name: TMDB_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: OMDb API key for domestic box office data (optional, get free at https://www.omdbapi.com/apikey.aspx)
environmentVariables.name: OMDB_API_KEY
